name: breakeven_locked_only_applies_squeeze
description: para_armed=False, breakeven_locked=True. The OR condition fires on breakeven_locked alone. Mirror of fixture 07; same numerical result by construction (squeeze fires once regardless of which flag). Pins the breakeven_locked=True branch in isolation.
derivation: safe_vol = 2.0. raw = 3.0. max(3.0, 0.30) = 3.0. breakeven_locked=True (OR fires) -> active *= 0.5 = 1.5. Output = 1.5. Identical to fixture 07 by symmetry of the OR; the property test asserts this equivalence explicitly.
